en.extract:
The brown-flanked bush warbler (Horornis fortipes), also known as the brownish-flanked bush warbler, is a species of bush-warbler of the family Cettiidae. It was formerly included in the "Old World warbler" assemblage.  It is found in Himalayas, South China and Southeast Asia.

The '''brown-flanked bush warbler''' ('''''Horornis fortipes'''''), also known as the '''brownish-flanked bush warbler''', is a [[species]] of bush-warbler of the [[Family (taxonomy)|family]] [[Cettiidae]]. It was formerly included in the "[[Old World warbler]]" assemblage.  It is found in [[Himalayas]], [[South China]] and [[Southeast Asia]].<ref name="iucn status 25 September 2021" />
